decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing fast mana acceleration and aggressive creatures to overwhelm opponents quickly. By ramping up with Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, players can quickly bring out powerful threats like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Badgermole Cub. Ba Sing Se and Earthbender Ascension provide additional support and protection for the creatures, allowing for a relentless assault on the opponent. The deck is designed to apply pressure early and maintain a strong board presence throughout the game, ultimately leading to a decisive victory.

The main idea of the deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of spells and abilities from the Izzet Control archetype. The deck focuses on card advantage and removal, with spells like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom. Agna Qel'a and Artist's Talent provide additional control and card draw options. Boomerang Basics and Firebending Lesson offer removal options, while Monument to Endurance and Gran-Gran provide protection and stability. Multiversal Passage allows for easy mana fixing, while Stormchaser's Talent and Riverpyre Verge help with card advantage and board presence. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents through careful resource management and control tactics.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of cards to bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard, creating a strong advantage over the opponent. By using cards like Requiting Hex and Day of Black Sun to manipulate the graveyard and reanimate creatures like Superior Spider-Man, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence. Additionally, the use of cards like Duress and Emeritus of Ideation help to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect the combo pieces. Overall, the deck excels at quickly rebuilding and dominating the battlefield through creative reanimation strategies.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells in order to quickly reduce their life total to zero. The deck includes fast mana sources like Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal, along with efficient burn spells like Shock, Burst Lightning, and Scorching Shot. The creature lineup consists of Hired Claw, Hearthborn Battler, and Stingerback Terror, which can quickly apply pressure on the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Great Hall of the Biblioplex and Hexing Squelcher provide additional value and flexibility in combat.

This deck is focused on quickly putting pressure on the opponent with low-cost creatures and spells, using the UR color combination for aggressive plays. The deck includes cards like Burst Lightning for direct damage and removal, as well as Stormchaser's Talent and Slickshot Show-Off for creature buffs and potential card draw. The goal is to maintain tempo and control of the board while dealing damage to the opponent to secure a quick victory. The deck emphasizes speed and efficiency in order to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. The deck includes low-cost creatures like Bloodghast, Iron-Shield Elf, and Marauding Mako to quickly build up a threatening board presence. Practiced Offense and Requiting Hex provide additional ways to push through damage and finish off the opponent. By utilizing a combination of efficient creatures and combat tricks, this deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain that pressure throughout the game to secure a quick victory.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly putting creatures on the board and overwhelming the opponent with a mix of early game aggression and late game power. Utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves to ramp up mana, Earthbender Ascension to buff creatures, and Surrak, Elusive Hunter for a strong finish, this deck aims to establish dominance early on and maintain pressure throughout the game. The addition of removal spells like Demolition Field and protection spells like Snakeskin Veil ensures that this deck can adapt to various situations and maintain its tempo.

The deck focuses on utilizing Uthros, Titanic Godcore and Omniscience to create a powerful combo that allows for quick victories. The deck also includes cards like Formidable Speaker and Lost in the Maze to control the board and protect the combo pieces. Marang River Regent and North Wind Avatar provide additional threats to pressure the opponent. The deck includes multiple ways to fetch lands such as Multiversal Passage and Bounce Off to ensure smooth mana production. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces quickly and overwhelm the opponent with powerful synergies.

The deck focuses on using control tools like counterspells and removal to disrupt the opponent's game plan while also generating card advantage through card draw effects. It uses powerful threats like Hearth Elemental and Eddymurk Crab to close out the game once the opponent's resources have been depleted. The deck aims to control the board and outvalue the opponent with efficient spells and versatile creatures. It utilizes a mix of card draw, removal, and counterspells to maintain control of the game and dictate the pace of play.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent with low-cost spells and creatures. The deck includes a mix of burn spells and efficient creatures to pressure the opponent early in the game. By being proactive and keeping the pressure on the opponent, the deck aims to win the game before the opponent can stabilize or mount a defense. Using a combination of tempo plays and direct damage, the deck aims to close out the game swiftly.

The main focus of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Pawpatch Recruit, backed up by powerful support cards like Seam Rip and Erode. The deck aims to quickly establish board presence and pressure the opponent to react, utilizing the efficient mana ramp from Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge to accelerate its game plan. By maintaining a fast pace and constantly applying pressure, the deck seeks to outpace the opponent and secure victory through relentless aggression.

The focus of this Izzet Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's plays through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. The deck utilizes cards like Traumatic Critique and Prismari Charm to deal with threats, while cards like Winternight Stories and Eddymurk Crab provide card advantage and card selection. Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal allow for consistent mana fixing, while Burst Lightning and Hearth Elemental provide additional removal options. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and outvalue them in the long game.

The main concept of this control Izzet deck is to carefully manage resources and manipulate the opponent's deck while maintaining card advantage. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments, Stock Up, and Accumulate Wisdom, the player can control the tempo of the game and prevent the opponent from gaining too much advantage. Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson are used as removal spells while Jeskai Revelation provides additional card draw. With a mix of control elements and card advantage engines, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a long game.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a combination of hand disruption, removal spells, and powerful creatures to outsmart and outlast the opponent. The main strategy involves disrupting the opponent's plans while gaining card advantage and resources through spells like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up. Valgavoth, Terror Eater and Superior Spider-Man provide powerful threats to close out the game, while cards like Winternight Stories and Quantum Riddler help maintain card advantage. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the control strategy with a combination of lands that provide access to all necessary colors.

This Azorius Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with low-cost creatures like Sage of the Skies and Starfield Shepherd, along with support from cards like Springleaf Drum and Daydream. The deck also includes powerful finishers such as Haliya, Guided by Light and Cosmogrand Zenith. Erode and Seam Rip provide removal options to control the board while cards like Quantum Riddler and Aang, Swift Savior offer card advantage. With a mix of aggression and control elements, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its creature synergy and versatile card choices.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures in the early game. It utilizes mana ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Ba Sing Se to accelerate into bigger threats like Badgermole Cub and Earthbender Ascension. The deck also includes cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Sazh's Chocobo to buff and enhance the creatures on the board. With the help of cards like Escape Tunnel and Icetill Explorer, this deck aims to maintain momentum and pressure to secure a quick victory.
